title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 544.197 - Sections 544.193 to 544.197 not applicable, when
text:
544.197.  Sections 544.193 to 544.197 not applicable, when. — The provisions of sections 544.193 to 544.197 shall not apply to persons committed to a correctional institution or jail by judgment of a court of competent jurisdiction.
(L. 1980 H.B. 982 § 3)
